views.title: Advanced rootless customization toolkit for iOS 16

views.markdown:
ProudLockX brings a polished set of system customization tools for rootless jailbreaks, focused on the Lock Screen, SpringBoard, status bar, dock, folders, passcode screen, signal indicators, camera controls, Photos controls, keyboard behavior, custom ringtones, and custom notification sounds.

Designed for users who want a cleaner and more personal iOS experience without unnecessary clutter. ProudLockX keeps its options organized inside a modern preference panel with multiple languages, refined icons, and carefully grouped controls.

Rootless only. Compatible with iOS 16.0 through iOS 16.7.15.

screenshots.accessibilityText: ProudLockX overview and status bar settings
Icon label, screenshot, and Photos settings
Custom ringtone and notification sound settings

views.markdown:
- Lock Screen customization
- Custom passcode title and passcode text
- iPhone X and iPad-style status bar options
- Full status bar hiding option
- Battery, signal, and carrier customization
- Dock, folder, and App Switcher controls
- Clock, date, font, and size customization
- Custom ringtones and notification sounds
- Photos, Camera, Screenshot, and Control Center refinements
- Multi-language preference panel

- Added custom notification sound support
- Added full status bar hiding option
- Improved language coverage across the preference panel
- Improved release hardening
- Updated package details for rootless iOS 16
- Refined preference panel organization and icons
- Added updated Sileo screenshots and package depiction
